grouped_control_rules.authority_safety_posture: Budget exhaustion and ambiguity state cannot be reset by worker restarts or new profile defaults.
grouped_control_rules.operator_visible_effect: Operators can inspect one grouped control packet across interaction, submission, and obligation views.
grouped_control_rules.recovery_posture: Replay, restore, and continuation reuse the grouped control packet instead of recomputing attempt budget and resend legality.
grouped_control_rules.state_or_outcome: The persisted reconciliation control contract must be copied onto AuthorityInteractionRecord, unresolved SubmissionRecord, and unresolved ObligationMirror.
grouped_control_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: An unresolved authority interaction remains pending across restore, replay, or continuation boundaries.

grouped_control_rules.authority_safety_posture: Canonical ingress receipt lineage prevents duplicate callback or poll deliveries from mutating legal state twice.
grouped_control_rules.operator_visible_effect: Recovery tooling can show exactly which persisted authority artifacts justified resumed work.
grouped_control_rules.recovery_posture: Outstanding unresolved authority work resumes from persisted control packets and ingress proofs.
grouped_control_rules.state_or_outcome: Authority recovery rebuilds outstanding transmit and reconciliation work from persisted receipts, interaction records, submissions, and inbox truth instead of broker replay.
grouped_control_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: Restore or failover reconstructs outstanding authority-integrated workloads.

precondition_rules.authority_safety_posture: Changed binding lineage or ambiguous evidence blocks automatic resend.
precondition_rules.operator_visible_effect: Operators can see whether a resend was truly legal or downgraded to read-only or blocked posture.
precondition_rules.recovery_posture: Mutation resend is not the default recovery posture; it must still satisfy exact recovery prerequisites.
precondition_rules.state_or_outcome: Automatic resend of mutation-capable packets requires unchanged binding lineage, unchanged idempotency scope, zero collision flags, and low unresolved external ambiguity.
precondition_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: The engine considers automatic resend of a mutation-capable authority packet.

resend_legality_rules.authority_safety_posture: No blind resend is lawful after budget exhaustion, contradictory evidence, or escalation posture.
resend_legality_rules.operator_visible_effect: Authority recovery views can show whether follow-up remained read-only, idempotent-only, or blocked pending escalation.
resend_legality_rules.recovery_posture: Restore, replay, or continuation resumes from the persisted reconciliation budget and deadline rather than resetting the clock.
resend_legality_rules.state_or_outcome: Budget remains active; bounded read-after-write or read-after-timeout checks are still lawful without a duplicate mutation send.
resend_legality_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: The reconciliation control contract evaluates resend legality after a response, timeout, restore, or reclaim boundary.

resend_legality_rules.authority_safety_posture: No blind resend is lawful after budget exhaustion, contradictory evidence, or escalation posture.
resend_legality_rules.operator_visible_effect: Authority recovery views can show whether follow-up remained read-only, idempotent-only, or blocked pending escalation.
resend_legality_rules.recovery_posture: Restore, replay, or continuation resumes from the persisted reconciliation budget and deadline rather than resetting the clock.
resend_legality_rules.state_or_outcome: Bytes already left the process but no provider response is durable; exact request-lineage recovery may continue without a fresh mutation packet.
resend_legality_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: The reconciliation control contract evaluates resend legality after a response, timeout, restore, or reclaim boundary.

resend_legality_rules.authority_safety_posture: No blind resend is lawful after budget exhaustion, contradictory evidence, or escalation posture.
resend_legality_rules.operator_visible_effect: Authority recovery views can show whether follow-up remained read-only, idempotent-only, or blocked pending escalation.
resend_legality_rules.recovery_posture: Restore, replay, or continuation resumes from the persisted reconciliation budget and deadline rather than resetting the clock.
resend_legality_rules.state_or_outcome: Automatic resend is blocked after budget exhaustion or unresolved contradictory evidence.
resend_legality_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: The reconciliation control contract evaluates resend legality after a response, timeout, restore, or reclaim boundary.

resend_legality_rules.authority_safety_posture: No blind resend is lawful after budget exhaustion, contradictory evidence, or escalation posture.
resend_legality_rules.operator_visible_effect: Authority recovery views can show whether follow-up remained read-only, idempotent-only, or blocked pending escalation.
resend_legality_rules.recovery_posture: Restore, replay, or continuation resumes from the persisted reconciliation budget and deadline rather than resetting the clock.
resend_legality_rules.state_or_outcome: Automatic resend is blocked because escalation ownership and workflow have taken over the unresolved case.
resend_legality_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: The reconciliation control contract evaluates resend legality after a response, timeout, restore, or reclaim boundary.
